new.name: CVE-2026-39200
new.description: The value of the produk request parameter is copied into the value of an HTML tag attribute which is encapsulated in double quotation marks. The payload xbnw0"><script>alert(1)</script>skc2h was submitted in the produk parameter. This input was echoed as xbnw0\"><script>alert(1)</script>skc2h in the application's response.
